# Claude Blog

> Index of articles published on https://claude.com/blog. Product news, best practices, and stories for teams building with Claude. Auto-generated daily from the source site.

## Articles

- [Agent view in Claude Code](https://claude.com/blog/agent-view-in-claude-code): Today we're introducing agent view in Claude Code: one place to manage all your Claude Code sessions.
- [Best practices for computer and browser use with Claude](https://claude.com/blog/best-practices-for-computer-and-browser-use-with-claude): Practical guidance for developers building computer and browser use integrations with the Claude model family.
- [Building AI agents for the enterprise](https://claude.com/blog/building-ai-agents-for-the-enterprise): In this guide, we share how leading organizations are using agents to transform their work today, and how Claude Cowork brings these capabilities to every team.
- [Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents](https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents-memory): Memory on Claude Managed Agents lets you build agents that learn from every task, user, and session, with no memory infrastructure to maintain.
- [Claude builds interactive visuals right in your conversation](https://claude.com/blog/claude-builds-visuals): Ask Claude to explain a concept or analyze your data, and it can respond with interactive charts, diagrams, and visualizations — rendered inline as part of the conversation.
- [Claude for the legal industry](https://claude.com/blog/claude-for-the-legal-industry): We're releasing 20+ new MCP connectors that link Claude to the software that the legal industry runs on and 12 new plugins tailored specific legal work and practice areas.
- [Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster](https://claude.com/blog/claude-managed-agents): Introducing Claude Managed Agents, a suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale.
- [Claude Security is now in public beta](https://claude.com/blog/claude-security-public-beta): Scan code for vulnerabilities and generate proposed fixes with Opus 4.7, on the Claude Platform, or through technology and services partners building with Claude.
- [Code w/ Claude SF 2026: Building on the AI exponential](https://claude.com/blog/code-w-claude-sf-2026-sf): Check out our Code w/ Claude SF sessions on YouTube.
- [Collaborate with Claude across Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook](https://claude.com/blog/collaborate-with-claude-across-excel-powerpoint-word-and-outlook): Claude for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word are generally available, and Claude for Outlook is now in public beta for all paid plans.
- [Deploying Claude across financial services](https://claude.com/blog/deploying-claude-across-financial-services): In this guide, we share how financial services firms are using Claude to compress their most time-consuming work, including customer examples and a practical adoption roadmap.
- [Deploying Claude across the enterprise with Claude Cowork](https://claude.com/blog/new-guide-deploying-claude-across-the-enterprise-with-claude-cowork): Learn how organizations use Claude Cowork to transform their day-to-day work, including use cases and best practices from Anthropic’s own teams.
- [Harnessing Claude's Intelligence | 3 Key Patterns for Building Apps](https://claude.com/blog/harnessing-claudes-intelligence): Three patterns for building on the Claude Platform that keep pace with Claude's evolving intelligence while balancing latency and cost.
- [How a non-technical project manager built and shipped a stress management app with Claude Code in six weeks](https://claude.com/blog/how-a-non-technical-project-manager-built-and-shipped-a-stress-management-app-with-claude-code-in-six-weeks): Kostiantyn Vlasenko had never written a line of code when he set out to build Respiro. Just over a month later, his product was live on the App Store.
- [How Anthropic's cybersecurity team built a threat detection platform with Claude Code](https://claude.com/blog/how-anthropic-uses-claude-cybersecurity): Jackie Bow, technical lead for Anthropic's Detection Platform Engineering team, shares how her team uses Claude Code to build tools that automate alert triage, accelerate investigations, and transform how security analysts work.
- [How enterprises are building AI agents in 2026](https://claude.com/blog/how-enterprises-are-building-ai-agents-in-2026): New research from 500+ technical leaders reveals how enterprises are deploying AI agents in 2026—and why 80% already report measurable ROI.
- [How Kepler built verifiable AI for financial services with Claude](https://claude.com/blog/how-kepler-built-verifiable-ai-for-financial-services-with-claude): Inside a platform that indexes 26M+ SEC filings, earnings call transcripts, IR presentations, consensus estimates, and private data across 14,000+ companies and 27 global markets, and how the team behind it built AI that validates every nu…
- [Improving frontend design through Skills](https://claude.com/blog/improving-frontend-design-through-skills): Best practices for building richer, more customized frontend design with Claude and Skills.
- [Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS](https://claude.com/blog/claude-platform-on-aws): The Claude Platform on AWS is now generally available, offering a new way for AWS customers to access the full set of Claude platform features with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement.
- [Lessons from building Claude Code: Prompt caching is everything](https://claude.com/blog/lessons-from-building-claude-code-prompt-caching-is-everything): Best practices for optimizing prompt caching in Claude Code, including how to most effectively structure your prompt, use tools, and layer on compaction.
- [New connectors in Claude for everyday life](https://claude.com/blog/connectors-for-everyday-life): Claude now connects to the apps you use every week, including AllTrails, Instacart, Audible, Booking.com, and TripAdvisor. Ask, and Claude brings in the right app.
- [New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration](https://claude.com/blog/new-in-claude-managed-agents): Dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration are now available in Claude Managed Agents. Build agents that learn, meet a quality bar, and work in parallel.
- [Preparing your security program for AI-accelerated offense](https://claude.com/blog/preparing-your-security-program-for-ai-accelerated-offense): We share our initial set of recommendations to shore up your defenses based on our own findings and security practices.
- [Redesigning Claude Code on desktop for parallel agents](https://claude.com/blog/claude-code-desktop-redesign): Today, we're releasing a redesign of the Claude Code desktop app, built to help you run more Claude Code tasks at once.
